reviews.text:
I’m a 54-year-old male who had been dealing with serious fatigue and brain fog. It got to the point where I didn’t feel like myself anymore. That changed when I found Ageless in Cherry Hill  and started working with Damian.

Damian took the time to review my blood work in detail and clearly pinpointed the root of my issues. He was incredibly knowledgeable, patient, and reassuring  never made me feel rushed or talked down to. He gave me real answers and a clear plan.

Thanks to his support and guidance, I’m finally getting back to feeling good both physically and mentally. And this weekend, I’m running a half marathon at the Rocky Run  something I couldn’t have done without Damian’s help.

If you’re tired of feeling off and want to get back to your old self, I highly recommend Damian at Ageless. He knows what he’s doing and he truly cares.

reviews.text: I was SO excited to learn that Limitless expanded their practice to treat women as well. I was blown away by Kristin’s in-depth knowledge around complex hormone issues and how they can negatively affect women. She ordered lab work which showed I had various imbalances, which my regular doctor never even thought to test for! With a few changes per her professional recommendation, I noticed a huge difference in my own health and overall wellness. If you’re a woman suffering from PMS, PMDD, or any variety of peri-menopausal symptoms, do yourself a favor and reach out to Limitless instead of continuing to suffer. I cannot recommend them enough!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3YR9W3Y1wYkR7dOxwbc8wgM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT200eGVYQTBkSHB0Y25kbU1IQmxTWGRHVTFwalJFRRAB
reviews.text: I can’t say enough great things about Kristin at Limitless Men’s Health and TRT. She is incredible at truly listening and taking the time to understand my personal health goals. After seeing numerous providers in the past who brushed off my concerns, Kristin actually heard me and took my symptoms seriously. She guided me through comprehensive lab work, which finally revealed the root of my issue. For the first time, I don’t feel dismissed or “crazy.” I have answers and a clear plan forward. Limitless is completely different from a typical primary care visit, and the thorough, personalized approach makes all the difference. I would highly recommend Kristin to anyone who feels unheard or hasn’t been able to get answers elsewhere.  And Yes, she does see women!

When I first met Anthony, my life felt completely upside down. I had just started my own business, moved from NY to NJ to care for my ailing in-laws, and on top of that my hormones were out of balance. I felt like a stranger in my own body and had gained 25 pounds.

Fast forward to today — the difference is night and day. Thanks to Anthony’s expertise, compassion, and his thorough approach with bloodwork and hormone replacement therapy, I feel like myself again. My hormones are balanced, I’ve lost 20 pounds, and both my personal life and my business are thriving.

I can honestly say that Anthony didn’t just restore my health — he gave me back my confidence, my energy, and my joy. He truly saved me, my marriage, and my business by helping me feel like the best version of myself again. I am beyond grateful for his knowledge and care. If you’re struggling and searching for someone who genuinely understands how to help, Anthony is the one.

reviews.text:

From the moment you walk in, the staff creates an atmosphere that is welcoming, attentive, and genuinely supportive. Their communication is seamless, with timely reminders and updates that make the entire process effortless.

I also want to highlight Alex and Kat, who have both made my experience exceptional. Alex is the one holding everything together at the front desk — she manages communication, keeps things running smoothly, and is often the first point of contact for clients. Her organization, responsiveness, and the way she guides people through the process show a level of dedication that really stands out.

Kat works directly with clients and brings an impressive level of care to every appointment. Her approach makes every visit feel comfortable, supported, and personalized.

Together, they bring a combination of professionalism, warmth, and genuine commitment that elevates the entire experience.

reviews.text:
I recently visited GameDay Men’s Health and had a great experience. The first thing I noticed when I walked in was how clean the place was. The whole office was really well kept and professional.
I met with Margie, and she was great to talk to. She took the time to explain the services they offer and answered all the questions I had. I was especially curious about peptides and had quite a few questions, but she was very patient and explained everything in a way that was easy to understand.
I eventually decided to go with a peptide blend. Margie also took the time to show me how to properly administer the peptides, which I appreciated. At no point did I feel pressured to buy anything, which made the whole experience feel very comfortable.
Overall, it was a really good visit and I’m glad I went in.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ5b_TTm3DwIkRBgQEyANZ7G8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21OVmIxTmlWUzFFVDJoVlVrTndlbEkzT1ZkMU1YYxAB
reviews.text:
As the owner of KGR Well Drilling, I spend most of my days doing physically demanding work. In a business like well drilling, staying healthy, strong, and mentally sharp isn’t optional, it’s necessary if you want to perform at your best every day.

GameDay Men’s Health has been a huge help with that. Their approach focuses on optimizing health based on individual needs rather than a one size fits all solution.

I especially want to recognize Margie. She handles everything incredibly well and always makes the process smooth and organized. Whether it’s scheduling, answering questions, or helping guide you through what you might need, she’s extremely knowledgeable and genuinely cares about helping people get the best results possible.

If you’re considering improving your health, energy, or performance, I highly recommend talking with Margie at GameDay. She makes it easy to stay on top of your health so you can continue performing at your best both professionally and personally.
.

reviews.text: I have been seven with BodyLogic. There are pros and cons to this network. I am very pleased with my doctor; however, there was a constant miscommunication with and within the supplement department. They did not have a system but an online shop and a patient portal. Every time the doctor sent in an order, it automatically turned on the automatic reorders, which sent me bottle after bottle before I had even finished my current bottle. I was very frustrated for a few years until they explained the above. I felt that too many cooks spoil the broth; a pharmacy in FL, bodylogic.com supplement website, testing, a lab in FL, and my preferred lab. Now it seems they are getting a bit more organized, allowing the patient to monitor, skip and cancel orders online. The pharmacy changed to one in TX, not really with a smooth transition, but I guess all beginnings are like that. I am looking forward to a better and more successful system.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ13OaBk_Nw4kR6HN59iFZB8k/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxMlNqbDZTRzF6WVc5WlltUjVkbk5EZDBNd0xXYxAB
reviews.text:
I went to Dr G Antaging for an initial consultation since I feel I need a professional’s opinion on what kind of treatment I will be needing. First of all, I have known Sarah years before, since we were coworkers in the same institution. Back then, she was a young nurse, ambitious, eager to learn and hard working.
Years later, I messaged her on IG since I learned from a reliable source that she has a skin care practice. Long story short, I made an appt and she was pleasantly surprised to find out it was me.
I am in my mid 60’s and of course signs of aging is showing. Sara didn’t jump on what I should be having done but instead asked me first what I feel are the things that bothered me. I told her and then she offered a treatment plan for me. Sarah is so knowledgeable that I completely trust her and told her, let’s go for it!
She did Botox on several places on my face and did skin rejuvenation. Sarah is so gentle, patient and always making sure I am comfortable during the procedure. Needless to say, I am now her forever patient.
They recently moved to a new location which is closer to me (thank goodness for that). I love the layout of their unit. It’s clean, warm and doesn’t make anyone feel intimidated. I look forward to coming here more.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ13OaBk_Nw4kR6HN59iFZB8k/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xNMmIwdHNTVzFDZFdaUGJFSmxSbkZZVFRSS04wRRAB
reviews.text:
I am new to the aesthetic world. 34 years old with a virgin face. After having 2 babies in 2 years I was desperate for a pick me up. I am a CRNA and very hesitant to trust providers. I couldn’t be more happy to have found Sarah and this practice. She’s so personable. My initial appointment she was so detailed, and she created an individualized care plan for the next few months. She’s so knowledgeable in all things aesthetics. Everything she discusses is evidenced based (this is huge for me).

reviews.text: I had an amazing experience at Drgantiaging. I had a chemical peel treatment, and from the very beginning I felt in truly professional hands with Sarah and Ailine. reviews.name: places/ChIJ13OaBk_Nw4kR6HN59iFZB8k/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tjM2JuVndOSGxrT0RsUU4xRlVSelZPTlZKaVYwRRAB
reviews.text:
I cannot say enough amazing things about Dr. G Anti-Aging Practice. To be completely honest, I was terrified to even go down the road of anti-aging treatments. I had so many fears, looking overdone, not looking like myself, or being pushed into things I didn’t truly need. Those fears disappeared the moment I walked through the door.

From the very first appointment, the experience felt different, in the best way possible. My initial visit was incredibly thorough and educational. Every question I had was answered with patience and without judgment, and I never once felt rushed or pressured. The focus was always on what was appropriate for me, my goals, and my comfort level.

Sarah is truly one of a kind. From the moment you meet her, she makes you feel like you’ve been best friends for life. She is warm, honest, and incredibly knowledgeable. She will never suggest something you don’t need, which immediately built my trust and put all my fears at ease.

After losing over 100 pounds, my skin started to look dull, tired, and lackluster, something many people don’t talk about after significant weight loss. Sarah created a thoughtful, personalized plan that completely transformed my skin and had me glowing just in time for my wedding. We did microneedling with PRP, Botox, medical-grade chemical peels and facials, and a small amount of lip filler to my top lip to even things out, all very natural and perfectly balanced.

Aline, their esthetician, deserves a special mention. She is absolutely amazing and so talented. Aline performs the medical-grade chemical peels under Dr. G Anti-Aging, and her expertise truly shows. She is gentle, thorough, and incredibly knowledgeable, always explaining what she’s doing and why. She also introduced me to a simple, effective skincare line that I now love, no overwhelm, just products that truly support my skin and enhance the results of my treatments.

This incredible duo made me feel confident, radiant, and truly beautiful on my wedding day. And the care didn’t stop there, we’ve already created a maintenance plan to keep my skin healthy, glowing, and youthful as I continue my weight-loss journey and embrace aging gracefully.

The practice itself is clean, professional, and welcoming, and the entire team genuinely cares. If you’re on the fence or scared like I was, know that you will be met with honesty, compassion, and natural-looking results that still look like you, just refreshed and glowing. I am beyond grateful I took that leap and wouldn’t trust my face with anyone else. Thank you ladies 💕
Pictured is my before and after.

reviews.name: places/ChIJYft9hUkzwokRDyHX5mMerMU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURQellmbGtRRRAB
reviews.text:
I am a 60 year-old male who is a nurse. I decided that I was going to make my life healthy and after losing over 100 pounds on Ozempic after being diagnosed with a fatty liver and now having a clean bill of health, this would probably mean I’m going to live for a long time. Ha ha……. after taking a long hard look at what I need to do to change my whole way of living, I decided to work out. This encompasses everything that I would need to make sure my body was healthy, of course by incorporating nutrition, hydration, and exercise. As I was working out the first month, I realized my endurance and strength was null to none. My trainer suggested an appointment with a men’s health consultant. Everyone says from the first phone call that they are impressed with the knowledge and genuine support you feel from every team member. , it can’t be more true. The nurse drawing your blood is fantastic. I’m a child with needles although I’m a nurse. The Medical staff is top-notch, and the provider is second to none. There is no sales pitches. I knew when I first entered the office what I wanted, and I was educated about everything that I asked for. You will not be sold something you don’t need, The first question is, what are your concerns and what do you expect. I wish I would’ve done this 30 years ago, but I guess it’s better late than never. I am all about baptism by fire working on a better body and making myself a healthier person. Jonathan, you should be very proud of yourself, as I am not easily impressed, but your knowledge and your compassion for helping people is the reason for your success!  I appreciate everything that you all have done for me and thank you for following with me on this journey to building a better me.
What’s in the cards for another office after East Brunswick in March??
People don’t make the mistakes that I did and wait till you’re 60 years old to be fit and healthy conscious. We spend so much money every day on junk, but the best investment is your health and when you are healthy mentally and physically, you do have a better you. When you break the costs down, The benefits are so inexpensive. The only better investment that I made in my lifetime was my house…The earlier in life, the better!
Make that move right now, and don’t make the mistake that I did waiting. Everyone tells me it’s never too late, but it sure would be a lot easier if I didn’t just start at 60. Have a healthy and happy holiday… Gameday…you saved my life thank you.!

I would highly recommend Dr. Kalika to anyone who feels stuck and who is looking for thorough, root cause approach to healing with whole person mindset.

reviews.text:
I don't think I could ever say enough compliments about Dr. Frank. A friend recommended him at a point where I was going through a very rough time both emotionally and physically and giving him a try has been my best decision yet. He's been my doctor for almost two years and my health has improved SO much. Since my first appointment I felt very comfortable. I tend to be a very annoying patient- I am always doing my own research and I always come in with a million questions and concerns and it can be very challenging for a doctor. I have never doubted Dr. Frank's procedures and/or decisions. He always handles my endless questions with lots of grace, patience and even humor. He takes his time to listen to each and every one of my concerns and always goes above and beyond to make me feel calm. If you have an anxiety disorder I would recommend giving him a try before going to a psychiatrist. I love the fact that he looks for the most natural alternatives to treat you and that he really takes his time to study your case before prescribing anything. I have been under the care of doctors who have diagnosed me with illness I've never had in the first place and put me under the worst of medications that do more harm than good.
I think Doctor Frank is one of the very few true doctors left- he's not in it for the money but because he genuinely wants to help people. He's easy to talk to, doesn't pretend he is a know it all or act superior. He truly listens and cares for you and your overall health. He was gone for a few months but he is finally back.

PS- I'm not from the area and he's literally the only reason why I visit Newark. The area where his office is located is nice and so far I believe it is safe.

reviews.text: I thank my lucky stars that I found Dr. Matos. I was feeling so awful and she was immediately able to cater my care to exactly what I needed to start feeling like myself again. The therapy she provides gave me back my energy, helped with my anxiety, and especially with my overall mood and ability to just handle life again! She is absolutely wonderful and I can't recommend her enough!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ4ffJwSzlwokR4sELJMUzYNA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tsUE5VRmZOVXhJUTNsMU9EaENXRVp0TVdobVEwRRAB
reviews.text: Let me start by saying Dr. Matos was nice enough but the entire consult gave me a very weird vibe. Something felt off from the moment I arrived. She met with me in her office and told me right out the gate “you’re perimenopause” and that I need to do pellets to feel better. To her credit I asked questions and she answered them but after about 5-7 minutes she cuts to the chase saying “so do you want to do it today?” I pumped the brakes because I’m really not comfortable with the fact that she didn’t really know me and was pushing this product. The deal breaker for me is that pellet therapy is irreversible. If the dosage is too high, I’m stuck. I had to ask questions to get her to tell me that testosterone will give me acne, which she said I could take spironolactone for. But that counteracts the libido benefits of the HRT so then I would just be stuck battling acne. After doing a lot of my own research I opted not to proceed with this treatment and got stuck paying $195 for the consult fee for a 10 min meeting. I am sure this may work for some but I got a very “leave and don’t look back vibe” from this place.

reviews.text: Patty was wonderful caring for my niece, Joelle. She is very kind and professional explaining each procedure with encouragement and empathy...I view her as a friend and would recommend your facility to anyone...God Bless

reviews.text: If i could give 10 stars i would..First off let me just say, i am very selective about who i trust with my health care needs.After long hours of research I decided the best approach for me to combat my debilitating menopause symptoms was BHRT. I have been here twice for SottoPelle pellet therapy. From my first phone call, to my in office visits, Wayne, Melissa, Genesis and Tara have each been knowlegeable, professional, thorough and kind in their jobs. The staff here are all so relatable that you feel welcomed and relaxed.🙏  Dr.Matos is extremely knowledgeable and takes her time to explain your labs, answer your questions, and makes a treatment plan specifically for you. Dr. Matos is passionate about what she does and how it benefits her patients! I am so grateful to have found them. I absolutely feel like myself again, with my Husband and children stating "we have our Wife and Mom back"!!!Advanced Harmone Solutions is a real Gem and I look forward to my next visit!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ4ffJwSzlwokR4sELJMUzYNA/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGTGRrdHJjWFZSY1ZSNWIwaGpRa055V1VaVlYxRRAB
reviews.text:
Ladies, you do NOT have to suffer with pre and post menopausal symptoms!
I did for 10 damn years.  No primary "care" or gynecologist had any solutions. I was miserable and my marriage suffered.
I had only tried bhrt pellets because I read they may help with migraines. Well, let me tell you, they help with EVERYTHING! As we age we lack in estrogen and testosterone. When men get low, doctors have no problem doing blood work and giving them as much T as they need while we are left to suffer.
I am begging all of you, go to Dr. Matos-Cloke, get your hormone levels tested, and get the pellet. My life is 1000% better!

After a few visits of doing the shockwave therapy I was able to walk better and tolerate standing for longer periods of time. My pain also improved and the swelling around the ankle also went down. Shellinie provided a detailed explanation about the shockwave therapy including benefits. On my sixth visit I also had a Vitamin C infusion which Shellinie discussed with me prior and we both decided to add as an adjunctive treatment. She explained in full detail would help reduce inflammation, speed up wound healing and provide immune support along with all the other benefits high dose IV Vitamin C has to offer. The IV she did was quick and painless and the infusion was done in no time. She is a professional, knowledgeable and I highly recommend.

Game Day Men’s Health (Roxbury)  is the real deal.

From the moment you walk in, you can tell this place runs on integrity and purpose. Ron is the kind of man you immediately respect — he genuinely cares about helping you become the best version of yourself and makes sure everything is handled with precision. Dr. Ahmad is phenomenal — extremely knowledgeable and professional, he takes the time to break everything down so you actually understand what’s going on with your body and your hormones. And Christina at the front desk is very welcoming, organized, and always on point

You can feel that everyone here wants you to win. They don’t just treat numbers; they treat people. I’m truly grateful for the way they’ve helped me get my hormones in check, feel balanced again, and perform at my absolute best — mentally, physically, and emotionally.

Thank you for everything Ron!

— Charles O.

reviews.text:
I recently attended the three-part seminar and I was truly impressed by the depth and breadth of information shared about women’s health and wellness. Dr. Kelly and  Dr. Nicole explained the physical, psychological and emotional changes women experience in a way that was both clear and scientific. Most health care providers simply don’t have the time to address the many issues women face as we age, so to be in a room full of women with similar experiences felt incredibly validating and comforting.
There is still so much for me to learn about this and  I have found my source at the Functional Medicine Center of NJ.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ170l5HTlwokRYAaDRBq5VbQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWVWJXbFRXVUZRZVc5SlZ6aHJjbE5uVjFWNVZHYxAB
reviews.text:
I recently attended a very informative and interactive menopause seminar at the Functional Medicine Center of NJ, and it was absolutely outstanding. What I loved most was that the entire presentation was rooted in science, yet explained in a way that was easy to understand and genuinely relatable.

Dr. Anderson and Dr. Blundy did an incredible job breaking down the changes our bodies go through before, during, and after menopause. They clearly explained why it’s so important to make sure our bodies are functioning optimally throughout this transition. I appreciated how they incorporated practical, actionable information about diet and lifestyle, offering real tools to fuel both body and mind.

They also provided thoughtful, balanced information about HRT and emphasized the powerful link between taking care of your body and the outcomes you can expect.

Overall, it was empowering, educational, and delivered with care. I highly recommend the Functional Medicine Center of NJ to anyone looking to better understand their health during menopause and beyond!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ170l5HTlwokRYAaDRBq5VbQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25GNmFVRkRUMlExU1dzNVNtUmZOMGh0UkdWWlpHYxAB
reviews.text: If you are looking for a functional medicine doctor, do not hesitate to book an appointment with the Functional Medicine Center of NJ.  I've been working with Dr. Kelly Blundy for over a year and could not recommend her highly enough!  I came to Dr. Kelly because I knew that something was off. I thought it was just hormonal issues but upon extensive bloodwork and thoughtful review, Dr. Kelly uncovered that I had high heavy metal toxicity, extreme adrenal fatigue and a methylation issue.  Under her careful and  thoughtful care, and following all of her recommendations, I can say that I feel SO much better.  I'm so grateful to her!!  The facilities and offerings at the Center have surely also contributed to my improvement. Knowing that I can book the treatments I need to support my health at the Center is comforting, convenient and has made such a difference.  From acupuncture with Sophia, to health coaching with Ellen to the salt room, infrared sauna, PEMF and sound healing - I feel like I have been addressing my overall wellbeing from so many integral angles and I'm grateful!  They make it easy. The staff at FMCoNJ are also wonderful to interact with. They are helpful and always make me feel welcomed!  I've been recommending Dr. Kelly and FMCoNJ to anyone and everyone and I figured it was time to finally write a glowing Google Review to let everyone else know - don't hesitate if you are looking for a partner in your wellness journey to get to the root of the issues you may be experiencing rather than just a bandaid from conventional doctors!  Dr. Kelly really listens and explains everything so you walk away feeling more empowered in understanding your body and health.  She and her staff really care about YOU and they make you feel like you are not just another "number" but a whole person whose wellbeing matters! Thank you so much, Dr. Kelly and all of the wonderful staff! I am forever grateful!!

reviews.text:

reviews.name: places/ChIJXZUUDarfxokRUN308Kr2Pok/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25WdFEweHRObTVaZGxWVWRsOUNXRkZvTXpkNk1YYxAB
reviews.text: I first met the guys at GAMEDAY Swedesboro at their tent for a Goliathon obstacle race over the summer. At the time I was 35, I had been curious about my testosterone levels for a few years now but always thought getting it checked was expensive and tedious. Boy was I wrong. Fran gave me his card and I made my appointment on the way home. When I arrived to the swedesboro location, I checked in with Rosemary and within 5 minutes I was already being taken to the back for my free consultation. I told them I was specifically interested in my hormones and overall health since I haven't gotten my blood tested since my bodybuilding days over a decade ago. I got my blood drawn quickly and painlessly. Next, I sat down with Dana their onsite licensed healthcare professional to discuss my goals and concerns, all while my blood was getting tested. After about 20 minutes, I had my results in front of me and was going over them with Dana. Sure enough, my free testosterone levels were quite low. I told her I still intend on having children in the future and she reassured me that Gameday could still help me get my test levels to an optimal range. I've been a customer ever since and I cant explain how grateful I am to them for the way I currently feel. I knew something had to be a little off and Dana pinpointed it. Within 4 weeks, I had already felt a huge improvement in my strength and to my surprise, my overall mood was just better. I was waking up easier in the morning and I wasn't getting tired anymore in the late afternoon. I would highly recommend anyone seeking to improve their quality of life to visit the team at Gameday swedesboro ASAP. i'm glad I did!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7W2sutypwIkRBI0lhQhfB60/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xsNFZrRldjVGxZYjNadVUwSktZa1pQVlRSNExXYxAB
reviews.text:
I’m a 65-year-old woman and I’ve been a patient at Restore Health by Science for several years. Working with Cara has truly given me my life back. I feel more motivated, energized, and far less achy day to day. Honestly, I’m feeling better than I have in a long time.

I’ve had longstanding thyroid disease, from Graves’ disease to Hashimoto’s, and I’m incredibly grateful to say my antibodies are no longer present. What sets Cara apart is the comprehensive, personalized care. She takes the time to truly listen, explain labs in a way that makes sense, and tailor a plan that fits you, not a one-size-fits-all approach.

If you’re looking for a provider who is knowledgeable, thorough, and genuinely invested in how you feel, I can’t recommend Restore Health by Science enough!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7W2sutypwIkRBI0lhQhfB60/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xCVGFsRlJSeTFsYmpSTVlraHhaMEY0Tld0UGIzYxAB
reviews.text: Restore Health By Science truly deserves every one of their five stars. Since starting hormone replacement therapy with them, I’ve gone from 14% body fat down to 6%, and I feel better, stronger, and healthier than I have in years. But what really sets this practice apart is the level of care and humanity they show. When I was hospitalized on New Year’s Eve and admitted for four days, Cara personally reached out to make sure I was okay—and even contacted my wife to check on her as well. That kind of compassion and personal attention is something you rarely, if ever, see in healthcare. Restore Health By Science doesn’t just treat numbers or labs—they genuinely care about people, and it shows.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7W2sutypwIkRBI0lhQhfB60/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xCYWQwdGtPVEIyVmpaT1RYRlBSVEpRUTJveFdIYxAB
reviews.text: As a woman in my 60s, I struggled with menopausal symptoms for years. My doctor visits were always quick and ended with "try a cream" or "take a pill," and nothing truly helped. Restore Health by Science was a completely different experience. Cara reviewed comprehensive labs with me, explained everything in detail, and created a personalized treatment plan. It took some time for me to adjust, but after a year of trusting the process, I've lost significant weight, my symptoms are almost gone, and I'm off my cholesterol meds. I'm beyond grateful-thank you!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7W2sutypwIkRBI0lhQhfB60/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21OR1ltRlZReTF1UjJ0QmVtZDRaMHBET1dFd09GRRAB
reviews.text: I had a similar emergency as another reviewer which could have ended with a stroke or heart attack. I was prescribed extremely high doses of Hormones and Thyroid compounds which elevated my blood pressure to highly dangerous levels of 194/110. Cara blamed 15 pounds of weight gain in 3 months on poor diet and something I am doing. I insisted I was eating clean and it was something I was taking. She had no answers and insisted it was not what I was prescribed causing my issues. I saw another physician immediately and told me to throw away whatever she gave me. Within 3 weeks blood pressure returned to normal and the weight came off. Take my word, there is no science to what she is doing. Her certification (worldlink) is a 3 day online course that any NP can take to prescribe hormones. Be careful with hormone specialists! I felt like a lab rat with what I was prescribed. If you ever need your medical records she charges you $1.00 a page after charging Thousands of dollars in fees. My new board certified specialist has me back on track within four months. I’ve lost all the way I gained from being on the excessive amount of hormones, my blood pressure has returned to normal, and I feel great with the exception of an ongoing concern of decreased kidney function, which was the result of the over prescribed hormones. What I have learned is hormone replacement therapy is not a one size fits all. While some people will feel great others can be at a very high risk if the provider is not careful.

reviews.text:
If you’re looking for a new physician, look elsewhere. Dr. Gonzalez is a great doctor knowledgeable, kind, and thorough  but unfortunately, the operations of his practice have become awful. I’ve been a patient for over seven years, and ever since his transition from Barnabas, the efficiency and communication in his office have gone downhill.

As someone who works in healthcare, this is disheartening to witness. I’ve been trying to complete a simple annual physical for nearly four weeks. My first appointment was booked online, but when I arrived, the office was closed. I rescheduled for September and was told I needed outside bloodwork. I never received the lab orders, despite calling four times over two weeks no one returned my calls. Then I got an email from LabCorp saying the orders were sent, but when I went there, they had nothing on file.

Dr. Gonzalez himself is excellent, but his staff and administrative processes make it nearly impossible to be seen or get follow-through on even basic tasks. After years of loyalty, this will be my last visit. I’ll be seeking a new primary care physician whose office values patients’ time and communicates effectively.

reviews.text: Dr. Rand may be the best kept secret in medicine. I started his program a year ago after experiencing severe weight-gain, extremely low energy, lack of motivation and profound signs of aging beyond my years (I was 46 at the time). Nothing helped. Not hitting the gym religiously, not a flawless diet, not a single medical or alternative doctor.  Nothing. I was ready to give up. On everything. Then I had the luck of stumbling across Healthy Aging Centers from a cursory Google Search and the reviews convinced me to give them a try. After a simple blood test Dr. Rand & his nutritionist Dave were able to diagnose my issues in ways no other practitioner had before. I was placed on hormone therapy and a new diet & supplement routine, and within weeks everything was getting better. My mood, energy, workout & diet results, motivation & even success at work all turned around for the better. But here’s the thing. It all kept getting better & better. People started to really notice. Plus, my blood test results kept improving dramatically each time & after a year I am back to the body weight & energy levels I had in my 20’s. No bull. Best part of all, I experienced ZERO side effects & my outlook on life has done a complete 180 degree turn.  I realize this review may sound too good to be true. I promise you it is not. It baffles me that such approaches to battling aging aren’t more widely available. Perhaps there’s some truth to the medical industry wanting to keep patients on the sicker side. But I can’t recommend Healthy Aging Centers highly enough. I am eternally grateful to Dr. Rand & the entire staff. They have tons of ways to help and all of them have worked wonders for me. Seriously. If I could offer you readers my email to verify this review, I would. If you want to live with the vitality you once knew as a young person, or have any hormonal issues whatsoever, give this office a shot. They’re the absolute best.

reviews.text: I am so happy I took the leap to start seeing Dr Rand, Dave, and everyone in their practice. reviews.text:
I usually don’t write reviews but felt like this one is warranted. I recently went to Strive wellness to try the fitness and recover IV treatment. I always found it difficult to recover from my CrossFit workouts especially leg intensive workouts so I wanted to try something. I was thoroughly impressed with the entire process. From the moment I walked in, Mercy was welcoming and knowledgeable, ensuring I understood the benefits of the treatment.

My session lasted about a hour and it was so relaxing. You are able to lounge in a recliner with a warm blanket. After the treatment, I didn’t want to leave the chair was so comfortable.

I was skeptical at first but the next day I wasn’t as sore and achy as I usually am after a workout. I was able to go to the gym feeling refreshed and full of energy. My Whoop recovery score was also higher than it usually is after an intense workout. I highly recommend Strive wellness. Mercy is awesome.
